title: Remove surviving unsafe cli defaults from the files that still carry them (B7/AO18)
action: Remove the SURVIVING unsafe/broken cli defaults. Panel (validation-slice-2a-i.md): config-sample-cli-executors.json, model-presets.md, swarming-reference.md were ALREADY fixed by ao-2e (commit 22e92f8) — do NOT re-touch. Live defect: .bee/config-sample.json:37 (`codex exec -m gpt-5.6-sol --yolo ... workspace-write` = both --yolo bypass B7 and workspace-write bare-positional B3) and the --yolo example in docs/config-reference.md:40. Replace both with a read-only sandboxed command that passes `bee config validate` (ao-2ai-1): `-s workspace-write` with stdin transport present, no --yolo/alias. Re-scope AO18 doc note: read-only default enforced by config-validate not prose. Cite B3,B7,AO18.

truths: .bee/config-sample.json and docs/config-reference.md carry no --yolo/skip-permissions/alias and no bare-positional workspace-write.
Files already fixed by ao-2e are NOT modified.
artifacts: grep/scan test scoped to ALL shipped configs+docs that fails on any skip-permissions/yolo/alias flag.
prohibitions: Do NOT re-edit files fixed by ao-2e.
No command shape the validator would reject.
No cli gather branch / purpose-scoped resolveTier (2A-ii).

trace.outcome: Removed surviving --yolo + bare-positional workspace-write from .bee/config-sample.json (now -s read-only + promptVia:stdin, validates clean) and docs/config-reference.md; new JSON-aware scan test guards all shipped samples/docs against unsafe aliases + validates samples.
deviations: swarming-reference.md:180 (+2 mirrors) still ships a cli JSON example with --full-auto (unsafe alias) — a real un-fixed instance of the same bug class, discovered during this cell. Left untouched per declared scope (cell bounded to config-sample.json + config-reference.md); filed as follow-up. New scan test does NOT yet cover swarming-reference.md.
trace.verification_evidence:
First-hand verify by orchestrator:
$ node scripts/test_config_samples_safe.mjs -> SUMMARY: 9/9 passed (exit 0)
  PASS .bee/config-sample.json validates with zero problems of any kind
$ node scripts/test_config_validate.mjs -> 24/24 passed (exit 0)
$ node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs -> 4/4 passed (exit 0)
$ validateModelsConfig(.bee/config-sample.json) -> problems: 0 (none)

Behavior change: .bee/config-sample.json cli default changed from `codex exec ... --yolo ... workspace-write` (bare positional = prompt bug + machine-wide bypass) to `codex exec ... -s read-only ... -` + promptVia:stdin, which now passes validateModelsConfig. docs/config-reference.md example matched. New scan test (JSON-aware, not naive grep) guards all shipped samples/docs against unsafe aliases.
